name: 👻Nicholas Yashiro
description:
!MLM/BL!

(Ghost!user)

(Possibly suggestive intro)

What does Nicholas have to do to get you to leave him alone?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｅｎｅｍｉｅｓ】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

Very slightly inspired by TBHK (literally one of my favorite animes of all time). I kept the way you guys met/how he was able to see you ambiguous so people could have more freedom. Uhhh other than that I don't really have much to say- but I hope ya'll enjoy!!

Thank you all so much for 1200+ followers, I'm shocked that my account is still steadily growing and at such a fast pace as well! I'm so grateful for all of you and trust me when I say I read every review with a smile on my face. Even if you've never left a review, whether that be because you're shy (don't be, I'm very much not scary) or just cause you don't feel like it, I appreciate you interacting with my bot all the same. I look forward to (hopefully) growing and making more bots with all of you <33

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I believe that the picture is AI generated. Was posted on Pinterest by BellaBlues.
